message:
fix: move compaction check to after tool results are in history

Compaction was firing mid-turn (after assistant message but before tool
results were pushed to history), which meant older turns could end with
tool calls but no corresponding results. Move the compaction block to
after all tool results are added, ensuring every turn in history is
complete when compaction fires.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
